// android/app/build.gradle
// Place this in your android/app/build.gradle after running `npx react-native init`
// The key values to set are listed below — the full file is generated by the RN CLI.

// ── KEY CONFIGURATION VALUES ──────────────────────────────────────────────
//
// In the defaultConfig block, set:
//
//   applicationId "com.pluralspace.app"
//   minSdkVersion 24
//   targetSdkVersion 34
//   versionCode 1
//   versionName "1.0.0"
//
// In the android block, set:
//
//   namespace "com.pluralspace.app"
//
// For release signing, add a signingConfigs block:
//
//   signingConfigs {
//       release {
//           storeFile file(MYAPP_UPLOAD_STORE_FILE)
//           storePassword MYAPP_UPLOAD_STORE_PASSWORD
//           keyAlias MYAPP_UPLOAD_KEY_ALIAS
//           keyPassword MYAPP_UPLOAD_KEY_PASSWORD
//       }
//   }
//
// And reference it in buildTypes:
//
//   buildTypes {
//       release {
//           signingConfig signingConfigs.release
//           minifyEnabled enableProguardInReleaseBuilds
//           proguardFiles getDefaultProguardFile("proguard-android.txt"), "proguard-rules.pro"
//       }
//   }
//
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// The full build.gradle is generated by: npx react-native init PluralSpace
// Then apply the values above. Do NOT copy this comment file as a real
// build.gradle — use it as a reference checklist only.
